# Skill Contribution

## Self-Checklist (required)

- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] One skill per PR
- [ ] Skill placed in correct track folder: `skills/<track>/<skill-name>/<skill-name>.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter complete: `name`, `description`, `framework`, `tier`, `track`, `author`
- [ ] Persona section present and adversarial
- [ ] Core question present
- [ ] Framework block: 3-5 sentences
- [ ] Pre-work section specifies required data
- [ ] 8-10 numbered segments with time boxes
- [ ] Exactly 5 named deliverables
- [ ] At least 3 facilitation rules
- [ ] Word count between 1,000 and 5,000
- [ ] No external API keys / dependencies

## Skill Summary

**Name**:
**Framework**:
**Tier**: 1 | 2 | 3
**Track**:
**Core question**:

## Why this belongs in Resilience Stack

(2-3 sentences — what diagnostic problem this solves that no existing skill covers)

## Test run

Confirm you ran this skill end-to-end at least once:

- [ ] Ran inside Claude Code with a real or stress-tested company context
- [ ] All 5 deliverables produced
- [ ] No infinite loops, no missing prompts

## License confirmation

- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under CC BY 4.0
- [ ] I authored the content or have the right to contribute it
